journeys.name: Journey 1: Knowledge Management Page Shell & Navigation
journeys.description: Verify the Knowledge Management page loads with correct shell, tabs, stats panel, sidebar nav entry, and deep-linking via URL hash

steps.expected_result: Knowledge Management page loads with breadcrumb, page header, 5 tabs, and stats panel
steps.visual_check: Page shows 'AI Administration > Knowledge Management' breadcrumb, title 'Knowledge Management', 5 tabs (Knowledge Articles, Training Examples, Corrections, Suggested, Settings), stats panel with 4 KPI cards above tabs, purple (#f4f2ff) background, Knowledge Articles tab active by default

steps.target: Sidebar navigation - Knowledge item under AI Administration
steps.expected_result: Knowledge nav item visible in sidebar with BookOpen icon
4 KPI cards visible: Total Articles, RAG Retrieval Rate, Correction Trend, Pending Reviews
steps.visual_check: 4 KPI cards with rounded-xl styling, custom shadows, JetBrains Mono numbers, staggered fade-in-up animation

steps.expected_result: Training Examples tab becomes active, URL hash changes to #training
Corrections tab is active via deep-link URL hash
steps.visual_check: Corrections tab is visually selected/highlighted, corrections content area visible

steps.expected_result: Settings tab is active via deep-link
Suggested tab is active via deep-link

journeys.name: Journey 2: Create a Knowledge Article Manually
journeys.description: Test the manual article creation flow via the Create Article dialog — fill form, submit, verify article appears in list

steps.expected_result: Knowledge Articles tab is active by default
Article creation dialog opens with animate-step-in animation
steps.visual_check: Dialog visible with Title field, Category dropdown, Content textarea (markdown), rounded-xl corners, Save button

input_data.title: EU Reverse Charge VAT Procedures
input_data.content: In our company, VAT code 3 refers to reverse charge for EU purchases. When processing EU invoices, always use VAT code 3 instead of standard rate. This applies to all B2B purchases from EU suppliers.

steps.expected_result: All fields filled and valid
Article created successfully, dialog closes, success toast appears, article visible in list
steps.visual_check: Success toast 'Knowledge article created and indexed', new article card visible in Terminology category section with title 'EU Reverse Charge VAT Procedures', source badge 'Admin' (purple), confidence score 1.0 (green/high), chunk count shown

steps.expected_result: Card shows title, Admin source badge, confidence 1.0, category badge, isActive toggle enabled

journeys.name: Journey 3: Upload a Knowledge Document
journeys.description: Test the document upload flow via the Upload Document dialog — drag-drop or paste content, submit, verify processing and article creation

steps.expected_result: Knowledge Articles tab loads
Upload dialog opens with drag-drop zone and text paste area
steps.visual_check: Upload dialog with dashed-border drop zone, 'Drop files here or click to browse' text, text area for direct paste, Category selector, Title field

input_data.title: PO Approval Workflow Guide
input_data.content_paste:
# Purchase Order Approval Workflow

## Standard POs (under £5,000)
- Any authorised user can create and approve
- Auto-approved if within department budget

## High-Value POs (£5,000 – £25,000)
- Requires Department Manager approval
- 48-hour SLA for approval response

## Strategic POs (over £25,000)
- Requires Finance Director approval
- Board notification for amounts over £100,000

steps.expected_result: Form filled with pasted markdown content
Processing indicator shows, then article created successfully
steps.visual_check: Success toast visible, new article card in Business Processes category with title 'PO Approval Workflow Guide', Admin source, confidence 1.0, chunk count visible

journeys.name: Journey 4: Edit a Knowledge Article
journeys.description: Edit an existing knowledge article — modify content, verify re-chunking notice, confirm update

steps.expected_result: Knowledge Articles tab loads with existing articles

steps.target: Overflow menu (three dots) on an existing article card
steps.expected_result: Overflow dropdown appears with Edit, Delete options
Edit dialog opens pre-filled with current title, content, and category
steps.visual_check: Edit dialog with pre-filled fields, source badge shown read-only, Save button

input_data.content: Updated content: VAT code 3 refers to reverse charge for all EU and post-Brexit UK purchases from foreign suppliers. Updated January 2026.

steps.expected_result: Content field updated, re-chunking notice appears
Article updated, dialog closes, optimistic UI update in list
steps.visual_check: Article card reflects updated content, success toast visible

journeys.name: Journey 5: Confirm an AI-Generated Knowledge Article
journeys.description: Find an unconfirmed AI-generated article, confirm it, verify confidence score upgrades to 0.8

steps.expected_result: Knowledge Articles tab loads

steps.target: Article card with 'Needs Review' amber badge
steps.expected_result: At least one unconfirmed AI-generated article visible with 'Needs Review' badge and confidence < 0.8
steps.visual_check: Card shows 'Needs Review' amber badge, AI Generated source badge, confidence score 0.5 in low/red indicator

steps.target: Overflow menu on the unconfirmed article card
steps.expected_result: Overflow menu shows Confirm option
Article confirmed, confidence upgraded to 0.8
steps.visual_check: Success toast 'Article confirmed — confidence upgraded to 0.8', 'Needs Review' badge replaced with 'Confirmed', confidence score now shows 0.8 in medium/amber indicator

journeys.name: Journey 6: Delete a Knowledge Article with Undo

steps.target: Overflow menu on an article card
steps.expected_result: Overflow menu visible
Confirmation dialog appears
steps.visual_check: AlertDialog with message 'This will deactivate the article. It will no longer be used for AI responses.' and Confirm/Cancel buttons

steps.expected_result: Article removed from list, undo toast appears
steps.visual_check: Article card removed from list with animation, undo toast visible with 'Undo' button and countdown

steps.expected_result: All filters cleared, full article list restored

Training example created, visible in list

steps.target: Overflow menu on new training example card

steps.expected_result: Output text updated
Training example updated in list

Confirmation dialog appears, confirm soft-delete
steps.visual_check: Delete confirmation dialog visible

steps.expected_result: Training example removed from list

steps.expected_result: Platform Admin AI Intelligence page loads with all sections

steps.expected_result: 4 cards visible: Contributing Tenants, Knowledge Articles, Total Corrections, AI Success Rate (%), each with JetBrains Mono numbers and trend indicators
Feature Gaps section visible with top 10 entries showing query description, module badge, tenant count, frequency, severity badge (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW), bar chart by module

steps.expected_result: Sortable table with columns: Skill Name, Module, Avg Success Rate, Avg Correction Rate, Usage Count, Tenant Count, Confidence, Trend
steps.visual_check: Table with colour-coded success rate cells (green >80%, amber 50-80%, red <50%), trend icons (↑ green, → amber, ↓ red), numbers in JetBrains Mono, skills with correction rate >30% highlighted with warning indicator, module filter dropdown above table

steps.expected_result: Both action buttons visible with Last aggregated timestamp

input_data.title: Construction Retention Invoice Best Practices
input_data.content:
# Retention Invoices for Construction

When processing construction contracts, retention invoices should hold 5% of the contract value for 12 months after practical completion.

## Key Rules
- Standard retention rate: 5%
- Retention period: 12 months
- Release requires completion certificate
- Partial releases allowed at 50% retention at 6 months

steps.expected_result: Form filled with all fields
Article created and published, success toast with eligible tenant count
steps.visual_check: Success toast: 'Knowledge article published — {N} tenants eligible', panel closes, page refreshes

steps.target: Correction Patterns section — 'Create Knowledge Article' button on a correction pattern
steps.expected_result: Publish Knowledge panel opens pre-filled with correction context
steps.visual_check: Publish panel opens with title pre-filled as 'AI Correction: {type} — {skill}', content pre-filled with correction context, category defaulting to BEST_PRACTICE

steps.expected_result: Draft saved, panel closes
